fields.field: Recipe name if from AI link

model.name: IngredientHistory
model.description: User's ingredient usage history for autocomplete

collection.name: users
collection.security_rules: allow read, write: if request.auth.uid == userId

collection.name: recipes
collection.security_rules: allow read: if request.auth != null; allow write: if false

box.name: cached_recipes_box
box.description: Last 50 viewed recipes for offline access

box.name: ingredient_cache_box
box.description: Full ingredient history cached for fast search

screen.name: Splash Screen
screen.description: App startup screen with logo and loading indicator

business_logic.check: 1. Check if user is authenticated (Firebase Auth)
2. If first-time user → navigate to onboarding
3. If not authenticated → navigate to login
4. If authenticated → check archive status → navigate to main

component.property: text: "Transform resep YouTube/blog jadi daftar belanja otomatis dengan AI"
text: "Checklist interaktif, pencarian bahan cepat, dan mode offline"
text: "Ratusan rekomendasi resep dari berbagai kategori"
text: "Dengan login, kamu menyetujui syarat dan ketentuan"

function.name: _signInWithGoogle
function.step: 3. If success: create/update user in Firestore
5. If error: show SnackBar with error message

error.message: Tidak ada koneksi internet. Coba lagi.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Profil nama dan foto dari Google ditampilkan setelah login

screen.name: Main App Shell
screen.description: Container with bottom navigation bar for 4 main tabs

on_init.step: 1. Check and archive today's note if date changed
2. Sync offline data to Firestore if online

screen.name: Today's Notes
screen.description: Main screen showing today's grocery list with checklist

component.property: actions: [ IconButton(icon: Icons.filter_list, onPressed: _showFilterSheet), IconButton(icon: Icons.sort, onPressed: _showSortOptions) ]
subtitle: "Yuk mulai tambahkan bahan makanan yang kamu butuhkan!"
message: "Mode Offline - Fitur AI tidak tersedia"
title: Text( item.name, style: item.isChecked ? TextStyle(decoration: TextDecoration.lineThrough) : null )

function.name: _showAddBottomSheet
function.step: Show ModalBottomSheet with 3 options: 1. Dari Link (AI) → navigate to /add-link 2. Input Manual → navigate to /add-manual 3. Reuse dari Arsip → navigate to /select-archive

function.name: _toggleCheckItem
function.step: 4. Save to Hive and Firestore (if online)

function.name: _deleteItem
function.step: 3. If not undone after 3s, commit deletion

function.name: _showEditDialog
function.step: Show dialog with form to edit item fields
On save: update item, save to storage

function.name: _showFilterSheet
function.step: Show bottom sheet with category checkboxes

function.name: _showSortOptions
function.step: Show dialog: Sort by Name | Category | Date Added | Status

data_flow.update_trigger: On item add, edit, delete, check/uncheck

acceptance_criteria.criteria: All items from AI and manual sources displayed
Checkbox updates item state with haptic feedback
Checked items move to bottom with strikethrough
Swipe to delete with undo SnackBar
FAB opens add options bottom sheet
Offline banner shown when no internet

screen.name: Add from Link (AI)
screen.description: Input recipe URL for AI extraction

component.property: text: "Paste link resep YouTube atau blog"
decoration: InputDecoration( hintText: "https://youtube.com/watch?v=... atau https://cookpad.com/...", prefixIcon: Icon(Icons.link), border: OutlineInputBorder )

function.name: _validateUrl
function.step: 1. Check if input matches URL pattern (regex)

function.name: _extractIngredients
function.step: 4. Cloud Function logic: - If YouTube: fetch transcript via YouTube API - If blog: scrape HTML content - Send content to Gemini API for extraction - Parse Gemini response into List<GroceryItem>
5. If success: navigate to /review-ai with result data
6. If error: show error dialog based on error type

cloud_function.name: extractIngredientsFromUrl

dialog.title: Bukan Resep
dialog.message: Link ini tidak terdeteksi sebagai resep. Coba link lain yang berisi resep makanan.

dialog.title: Halaman Terlalu Lambat
dialog.message: Halaman terlalu lambat dimuat. Coba buka link di browser, lalu salin teks resepnya dan paste di sini.

dialog.title: Video Tanpa Teks
dialog.message: Video tidak memiliki teks tersedia. Coba cari resep yang sama dalam format blog.

screen.name: Add from Text Manual
screen.description: Paste recipe text as fallback for problematic links

component.property: text: "Paste atau ketik resep lengkap di sini"

decoration: InputDecoration( hintText: "Contoh:

Bahan:
- 2 siung bawang putih
- 200gr daging ayam
- 1 sdt garam
...", border: OutlineInputBorder )

screen.name: Review AI Extraction Result
screen.description: Review and edit AI-extracted ingredients before saving

component.property: itemBuilder: (context, index) => EditableIngredientCard( key: ValueKey(ingredients[index].id), item: ingredients[index], onEdit: () => _editItem(index), onDelete: () => _deleteItem(index) )

widget.name: EditableIngredientCard
widget.description: Card with edit and delete buttons

component.property: trailing: Row( IconButton(icon: Icons.edit, onPressed: onEdit), IconButton(icon: Icons.delete, onPressed: onDelete) )

function.name: _editItem
function.step: Show dialog with form fields (name, quantity, unit, category, notes)
On save: update item in list

function.name: _showAddItemDialog
function.step: Show dialog with form to add new item manually
On save: add to ingredients list

function.name: _saveToToday
function.step: 3. Set recipeTitle and recipeUrl if from AI link

acceptance_criteria.criteria: User can edit any item (name, quantity, unit, category)
User can delete items with confirmation
User can add new items manually
User can reorder items via drag handle
Notes saved to Today immediately on save button

screen.name: Add Manual Grocery Item
screen.description: Manually input grocery items with ingredient search

component.property: itemBuilder: (context, index) => ListTile( title: Text(searchResults[index].name), subtitle: Text(searchResults[index].category), trailing: Text("${searchResults[index].useCount}x"), onTap: () => _selectFromHistory(searchResults[index]) )
items: [ "Sayuran", "Buah", "Daging & Seafood", "Bumbu & Rempah", "Susu & Olahan", "Karbohidrat & Biji-bijian", "Minuman", "Frozen Food", "Snack", "Lainnya" ]
decoration: InputDecoration( labelText: "Catatan Tambahan (Opsional)", hintText: "Contoh: merk A, ukuran besar" )

component.description: List of items added but not yet saved

function.name: _searchIngredientHistory
function.step: 1. Query Hive ingredient_cache_box with search term

function.name: _selectFromHistory
function.step: 3. Focus on quantity field for quick edit

function.name: _addToTempList
function.step: 5. Update ingredient history (increment useCount, update lastUsed)

function.name: _saveAllToToday
function.step: 2. Add current item to tempItems if valid
7. Update ingredient history in Hive and Firestore

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Tap result auto-fills form with quantity default 1
User can add multiple items before saving
All items saved to Today's Notes on final save
Ingredient history updated with each new item

screen.name: Select Archive to Reuse
screen.description: Choose archived note to copy to Today

component.property: subtitle: "Notes yang sudah lewat akan muncul di sini"
itemBuilder: (context, index) => ArchiveCard( archive: archives[index], onTap: () => _showReuseConfirmation(archives[index]) )
subtitle: Column( Text("${DateFormat('EEEE, dd MMMM yyyy').format(archive.date)}"), Text("${archive.items.length} bahan • ${(archive.completionRate * 100).toInt()}% selesai") )

function.name: _showReuseConfirmation
function.step: Show AlertDialog: Title: "Reuse Notes Ini?" Content: "Semua bahan dari [tanggal] akan ditambahkan ke Today's Notes." Actions: ["Batal", "Ya, Reuse"]

function.name: _reuseArchive
function.step: 2. Create copies of all items from archive (reset isChecked to false)

screen.name: My Notes Archive
screen.description: List of archived grocery notes from past days

component.property: subtitle: "Notes lama akan tersimpan otomatis setiap hari"

widget.name: ArchiveCard
widget.description: Same as in select_archive but with swipe to delete

function.name: _deleteArchive
function.step: 2. On confirm: delete from Firestore and Hive

function.name: _showSearchDelegate
function.step: Show search delegate to filter archives by date or recipe name

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Each card shows date, item count, recipe title

screen.name: Archive Detail
screen.description: Read-only view of archived note with reuse option

component.property: actions: [ IconButton(icon: Icons.share, onPressed: () => _shareArchive()), IconButton(icon: Icons.delete, onPressed: () => _deleteArchive()) ]

function.name: _shareArchive
function.step: 2. Use Share.share() to share via system share sheet

function.name: _deleteArchive
function.step: 2. On confirm: delete from Firestore and Hive

function.name: _showReuseConfirmation
function.step: On confirm: copy items to Today, navigate to /main/today

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Display all items in read-only mode
Reuse button copies all items to Today

component.property: children: categories.map((cat) => FilterChip( label: Text(cat.emoji + " " + cat.name), selected: selectedCategories.contains(cat), onSelected: (selected) => _toggleCategory(cat, selected) ))
subtitle: "Coba kata kunci lain atau hapus filter"

function.name: _refreshRecipes
function.step: 1. If online: fetch latest from API

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Reset filter button clears all filters
Offline mode shows cached recipes with banner

screen.name: Recipe Detail
screen.description: Full recipe view with ingredients, steps, and action buttons

component.property: itemBuilder: (context, index) => Padding( padding: 8px vertical, child: Row( Icon(Icons.check_circle_outline, size: 20, color: Colors.green), SizedBox(width: 12), Expanded(child: Text(recipe.ingredients[index])) ) )

itemBuilder: (context, index) => Padding( padding: 12px vertical, child: Row( crossAxisAlignment: start, CircleAvatar( child: Text("${index + 1}"), backgroundColor: Colors.primary ), SizedBox(width: 12), Expanded(child: Text(recipe.steps[index])) ) )
style: full width, height 48, primary color

function.name: _createNotesFromRecipe
function.step: 2. Call Cloud Function with recipe data (or extract locally)

function.name: _shareRecipe
function.step: 1. Generate shareable text (title + ingredients + source URL)

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Display thumbnail, title, category, time, servings, difficulty

screen.name: In-App Web Browser
screen.description: WebView for opening recipe source URLs without leaving app

component.property: actions: [ IconButton(icon: Icons.refresh, onPressed: () => webViewController.reload()), IconButton(icon: Icons.open_in_browser, onPressed: () => _openInExternalBrowser()) ]

function.name: _openInExternalBrowser
function.step: Use url_launcher to open URL in device's default browser

screen.name: Profile & Settings
screen.description: User profile, settings, and account management

function.name: _showThemeDialog
function.step: Show dialog with 3 radio options: Light, Dark, System
On selection: update theme in Hive and Firestore, apply theme

function.name: _showAboutDialog
function.step: Show dialog with app info: logo, name, version, author, year

function.name: _showLogoutConfirmation
function.step: On confirm: Firebase Auth signOut(), navigate to /login

screen.name: Ingredient History
screen.description: List of all ingredients user has ever added

component.property: subtitle: "Bahan yang pernah kamu input akan muncul di sini"

itemBuilder: (context, index) => Dismissible( key: ValueKey(filteredIngredients[index].id), direction: DismissDirection.endToStart, onDismissed: (direction) => _deleteIngredient(filteredIngredients[index]), background: Container(color: Colors.red, child: Icon(Icons.delete)), child: ListTile( leading: CircleAvatar(child: Icon(Icons.restaurant)), title: Text(filteredIngredients[index].name), subtitle: Text(filteredIngredients[index].category), trailing: Column( mainAxisAlignment: center, Text("${filteredIngredients[index].useCount}x", style: headline6), Text("Digunakan", style: caption) ) ) )

function.name: _filterIngredients
function.step: Filter ingredients by name (case-insensitive, partial match)

function.name: _showDeleteAllConfirmation
function.step: On confirm: clear all ingredient history from Hive and Firestore

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Display all ingredients sorted by useCount descending

service.name: DailyArchiveScheduler
service.description: Automatically archive today's note at midnight

trigger.fallback: On app startup if date has changed

function.name: checkAndArchiveIfNeeded
function.step: 3. If different: a. Create ArchivedNote from TodayNote b. Calculate completionRate c. Save to Firestore users/{userId}/notes/ d. Update Hive archived_notes_box e. Clear today_note from Hive f. Initialize new empty TodayNote for today

service.name: OfflineSyncService
service.description: Sync local Hive data with Firestore when online

function.name: syncToFirestore
function.step: 2. If now online: a. Sync today_note to Firestore b. Sync ingredient_history updates c. Fetch any remote changes (conflict resolution: last-write-wins) d. Update Hive cache with merged data

service.name: CacheManagementService
service.description: Manage offline cache sizes and cleanup

trigger.schedule: Daily or on low storage event

flow.name: AI Link to Grocery Notes (Happy Path)
flow.description: User extracts ingredients from YouTube/blog recipe

steps.step: 1. User on Today screen, taps FAB
4. User pastes recipe URL in TextField

8. Cloud Function receives request: a. If YouTube: fetch transcript via YouTube Data API b. If blog: scrape HTML content c. Send content to Gemini API with prompt d. Parse Gemini JSON response into List<GroceryItem>
11. User reviews list, optionally edits items
13. Items added to today_note in Hive
17. New items appear in Today's list

flow.name: Manual Grocery Item with Search
flow.description: User manually adds ingredient using history search

steps.step: 1. User on Today screen, taps FAB
7. Form auto-fills with name, category, default quantity=1
8. User edits quantity to 5, selects unit "siung"
10. Item added to today_note in Hive

flow.name: Recipe Discovery to Grocery Notes
flow.description: User finds recipe in Discover and creates notes

steps.step: 2. User searches "ayam" or selects "Ayam & Unggas" filter
4. User taps recipe card → navigate to /recipe-detail/:id
5. Recipe detail loads with ingredients and steps
6. User taps "Buat Notes dari Resep Ini"
8. Cloud Function or local parser extracts ingredients
10. User reviews and saves to Today
12. Recipe ingredients appear in Today's list

flow.name: Daily Archive at Midnight
flow.description: Automatic archiving of today's note at midnight

steps.step: 2. Background service or app startup triggers checkAndArchiveIfNeeded()
5. Service creates ArchivedNote: - Copy all fields from TodayNote - Set status = "archived" - Calculate completionRate = checkedCount / totalCount - Set archivedAt = yesterday's end-of-day
6. Service saves ArchivedNote to Firestore users/{userId}/notes/{noteId}
7. Service adds to Hive archived_notes_box (keep last 30)
9. Service creates new empty TodayNote with current date
10. Next time user opens app, Today screen is clean
11. Archived note visible in My Notes tab

flow.name: Reuse Archive
flow.description: User copies items from old note to today

steps.step: 1. User on Today screen, taps FAB
3. List of archived notes shown (newest first)
4. User taps archive card from 3 days ago
8. Service creates copies of all items (reset isChecked=false)
9. Service adds copies to today_note.items in Hive
13. Reused items appear in Today's list

flow.name: Offline Shopping Experience
flow.description: User shops with app offline, syncs when back online

steps.step: 1. User opens app at home (online), reviews Today's list
3. App detects offline, shows banner "Mode Offline"
4. User can still view Today's list (loaded from Hive)
5. User checks items as purchased (haptic feedback)
7. User returns home, connects to WiFi
9. Service syncs today_note changes to Firestore
11. Data now consistent across devices (if multi-device future)

note.title: Riverpod Providers Structure
note.content: Use StateNotifier for mutable state (TodayNote, RecipesList). Use FutureProvider for async data fetching (Firestore queries, API calls). Use StreamProvider for real-time listeners (Firestore today_note). Create provider file per feature: today_provider.dart, recipes_provider.dart, etc.

note.title: Hive as Source of Truth
note.content: ALL read operations should check Hive first, then Firestore if cache miss. ALL write operations should write to Hive immediately, then Firestore async. Use Firestore onSnapshot listeners only for critical real-time data (today_note). Implement proper error handling for Firestore failures (don't break app if offline).

note.title: AI Extraction Cloud Function Architecture
note.content:
Create Firebase Cloud Function: extractIngredientsFromUrl(url, userId). Function should: 1. Validate URL and user authentication 2. Check Firestore for user's daily API quota (limit 10 requests/day) 3. Route to appropriate extractor (YouTube API or web scraper) 4. Send extracted content to Gemini API with structured prompt 5. Parse Gemini response (expected JSON format) 6. Return formatted List<GroceryItem> or error 7. Log all requests for debugging and quota tracking
Gemini Prompt Template: "Extract all ingredients from this recipe content. Return ONLY a JSON array of objects with fields: name (string), quantity (number), unit (string), category (string from: Sayuran, Buah, Daging & Seafood, etc.). If no quantity specified, use 1. Example: [{\"name\": \"Bawang Putih\", \"quantity\": 2, \"unit\": \"siung\", \"category\": \"Bumbu & Rempah\"}]"

note.title: Implementing Daily Auto-Archive
note.content: Use WorkManager (Android) to schedule daily background task at 00:00. Register periodic work in main.dart after initialization. Implement checkAndArchiveIfNeeded() in ArchiveSchedulerService. ALSO call checkAndArchiveIfNeeded() on every app startup (failsafe). Store last archive check timestamp in Hive to prevent multiple archives.

note.title: Optimization Checklist
note.content: - Use cached_network_image for all network images with placeholder - Implement pagination for My Notes (load 20 at a time) - Use ListView.builder (not ListView) for dynamic lists - Debounce search inputs (300ms for ingredient search, 500ms for recipe search) - Lazy load recipe details (don't fetch until user navigates to detail) - Index Hive boxes by frequently queried fields (ingredient name, date) - Use Firestore composite indexes for complex queries

note.title: Error Handling Strategy
note.content: Create centralized error handler: lib/utils/error_handler.dart Catch all exceptions in try-catch blocks at provider level Show user-friendly SnackBar or Dialog for errors (no stack traces shown) Log errors to Firebase Crashlytics with context (user ID, action, timestamp) Network errors: show "No internet" banner, queue actions for retry AI errors: provide fallback options (manual input, try different link)

note.title: Testing Requirements (Phase 3)
note.content:
Unit tests: - GroceryItem model serialization/deserialization - Ingredient search algorithm - Archive logic (date comparison, completion rate calculation)
Widget tests: - TodayScreen empty state and item list - AddManualScreen form validation - RecipeCard rendering
Integration tests: - Complete AI extraction flow (mock Cloud Function) - Offline to online sync - Daily archive trigger
Manual tests: - Test on physical device (minimum Android API 30) - Test offline mode completely (airplane mode) - Test archive at midnight (change device date/time) - Test AI extraction with 20+ diverse recipe links

note.title: Security Best Practices
note.content: - Store API keys (Gemini, YouTube) in Cloud Functions env vars, NEVER in client - Implement Firestore security rules: allow read/write only if auth.uid == userId - Rate limit Cloud Functions: max 10 AI requests per user per day - Validate all user inputs on both client and server - Use HTTPS only for all API calls - Sanitize URLs before passing to scraper (prevent injection attacks)

note.title: Indonesian Language Implementation
note.content: All UI text in Bahasa Indonesia (primary). Error messages in Indonesian with clear actionable guidance. Date formatting: Use intl package with 'id_ID' locale. Example: DateFormat('EEEE, dd MMMM yyyy', 'id_ID').format(date) Currency (future): Rupiah (Rp) format with thousand separators. Future consideration: Add English translation for v2.0.

criteria_list.criteria: Functionality matches all Acceptance Criteria in PRD
Error states handled gracefully (no uncaught exceptions)
Empty states implemented with illustrations and helpful text
Works offline for core features (Today, My Notes)
Loading states use Shimmer skeleton or CircularProgressIndicator
Firebase Crashlytics shows 0 crashes for the feature
UI consistent with design system (colors, fonts, spacing)
Tested on minimum 1 physical Android device or emulator (API 30+)
Code reviewed by at least 1 other developer (self-review if solo)
No TODO or FIXME comments left in production code
Feature documented in README with screenshots

deployment_checklist.item: Enable Firestore security rules in production
Test APK on multiple Android devices (different screen sizes)
Verify all API keys are in Cloud Functions env vars (not in code)
Test release APK thoroughly (offline, online, all flows)
Create GitHub release with APK and screenshots
Optional: Prepare for Google Play Store submission (future)
